title: kyllinga colorata
intro: Kyllinga colorata, also known as the flowering water pygmy-perch lily, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that help to reduce swelling and combat infections. The health benefits of Kyllinga colorata include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are often dried, powdered, and used to make teas, infusions, and other remedies that can be used to alleviate these conditions.
